title: WAGNER SteamForce Speed Pro steam Wallpaper Remover, Container Volume: 5.1 l, Max. Steaming time: 68 min, Hose Length: 5 m, 2750 W, 230 V
features: Ready to use quickly - Flash boil technology heats the water in under four minutes
Versatile - two different steamer plates to adapt to any surface. Easy to use – 5 m hose for large working range and easy filling thanks to removable water tank.
Clever storage - the steamer plates, hose and power cable can be stored in the device. Easy transport - foldable carrying handle and two side handles.
Powerful - effectively removes all types of wallpaper including multiple layers. No pre-treatment necessary – no chemicals required, even small sections can be removed without leaving any residue.
Very easy to maintain - with replaceable heating element
description: From the manufacturer WAGNER SteamForce Speed Pro The steam wallpaper stripper for professionals Quick to use thanks to minimal heating time - the innovative Flash Boil technology means that the SteamForce Speed Pro steam wallpaper stripper is ready for use in less than 4 minutes. The scope of delivery includes two practical steam plate sizes for narrow areas and spacious surfaces. Efficiency without chemicals Steam is generated in the steam wallpaper stripper with the help of the heating element. The steam plate is placed on the desired area and steams the wallpaper until it is softened. The steam effectively dissolves the wallpaper paste so that the wallpaper can be removed quickly and easily. Small steam plate for narrow areas Large steam plate for large areas Voltage 230 V / 50 Hz Load capacity step 150 kg Container volume 5.1 l Steam time, max. 78 min Power / heat output, max 2750 W Size of the steam plates 321 x 242 mm and 150 x 75 mm Mains cable length 5 m Hose length 5 m Weight 7.5 kg

specifications_table.Included Components: ‎1x 5m hose, 1x Large steamer plate, small steamer plate, 1x SteamForce Speed Pro base device
